title: Color Swapper
description: Changes colors of blocks and armor so you can choose how your team looks
body:
# ColorSwapper mod This mod allows you to change the color of your team in Hypixel BedWars. It probably could be configured to work in other minigames/servers. ## Usage Use `/iwannabe ` command to specify the color you wanna be.
Use `/colormapping map ` to make color1 render as color2
Use `/colormapping print` to see all mapped colors
